Character Sheet

Asheron's Call has no classes — you are what you train. Spend points to grow.
Attribute Points: 0 (raise the six attributes)
Skills — Train / Specialize with skill credits, then raise ranks with unspent XP

Inventory & Tinkering

Salvage loot into materials, then tinker your gear — a craft of Dereth. Equip an item to gain its bonus.
Equipment — click a worn item to unequip

Vendor of Holtburg

Spend your hard-won pyreals on potions, or sell loot you don't need. Quaff with R / G / F in the field.

Bestiary

Creatures of Dereth — the volcanic isle of the world Auberean — and their elemental natures.

Spellbook

Your learned spells. Assign any known spell to a hotbar slot (1–8, z, x). Scribe scrolls (T) to learn more; higher spell levels need a higher skill in that school.

Map of Dereth

The lands of Dereth — click any town to fast-travel.

DERETH

A first-person Asheron's Call homage · for Apple Silicon Macs
You wake on the shores of a fractured world, summoned by the wizard Asheron through a shimmering portal. There are no classes here — only the skills you choose to hone. Bind yourself to a Lifestone so death is never the end, then hunt the drudges and mosswarts of the wilds.
W A S D move  ·  Mouse look  ·  Click attack  ·  Shift sprint  ·  Space jump  ·  Shift+Space dodge  ·  Q swap sword/bow
1 Flame   2 Frost   3 Heal   4 Stam→Mana   5 Lightning   6 Flame Storm   7 Blade Lure   8 Quickening

R/G health   F mana   9/0 elixirs   Tab map (click to travel)   O settings   M mute   P pause
a day/night cycle & changing weather sweep over Dereth, and a world boss roams the far reaches
